name: myhugoapp

scripts.test: npm run test:contrast && npm run test:layout && npm run test:html && npm run test:js && npm run test:seo && npm run test:performance && npm run test:url && npm run test:integration && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:content && npm run test:security
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:pa11y
scripts.test:quick: npm run test:contrast && npm run test:layout && npm run test:js
scripts.test:core: npm run test:contrast && npm run test:layout && npm run test:html && npm run test:js
scripts.test:extended: npm run test:seo && npm run test:performance && npm run test:integration && npm run test:mobile
scripts.test:quality: npm run test:content && npm run test:security

author: Chemie Lernen Team
description: Chemie Lernen - Hugo site with dark mode and comprehensive testing
